# @GenerateCodec

Instructs the KSP processor to generate a `BuilderCodec<T>` for the annotated class at compile time. The generated codec is used to serialize and deserialize the class from Hytale's codec format.

**Target:** `class`
**Retention:** `SOURCE` (compile-time only)

## Parameters

None.

## Generated output

The processor generates a top-level property named `CodecBuilder<ClassName>` in the same package as the annotated class.

```kotlin
// Generated file: HomingProjectileComponentCodec.kt
val CodecBuilderHomingProjectileComponent: BuilderCodec<HomingProjectileComponent> = ...
```

You assign this to `CODEC` in the companion object — see [Required companion object](#required-companion-object).

## Usage

```kotlin
@GenerateCodec
class HomingProjectileComponent : Component<EntityStore> {
    @CodecProperty(documentation = "Enable/Disable Homing Feature")
    var isEnabled = false

    companion object : CodecProvider<HomingProjectileComponent>, ComponentTypeProvider<HomingProjectileComponent> {
        override var componentType: ComponentType<EntityStore, HomingProjectileComponent>? = null
        override val CODEC: BuilderCodec<HomingProjectileComponent> =
            CodecBuilderHomingProjectileComponent // (1)!
    }
}
```

1. This is generated by the compiler. If it is not resolvable, build or run the project first.

## Required companion object

The companion object must implement `CodecProvider<T>` and assign the generated `CodecBuilder<ClassName>` to `CODEC`. Without this, the codec cannot be referenced by the registry.

!!! warning
    The processor emits a warning and skips code generation if no [`@CodecProperty`](codec-property.md)-annotated fields are found on the class.

## Inheritance

If the class inherits from a base class that also has a `CODEC` in its companion, the generated codec is built with the parent codec and inherited properties use `.appendInherited(...)` automatically. No extra configuration is needed.

## Dependencies

`@GenerateCodec` is required by [`@RegisterComponent`](register-component.md) and [`@RegisterInteraction`](register-interaction.md) — both require the class to be serializable.

## See also

- [`@CodecProperty`](codec-property.md) — marks fields for inclusion in the generated codec
- [`@CodecRequiredValidator`](codec-required-validator.md) — adds a non-null validator to a field
- [`@CodecProjectileValidator`](codec-projectile-validator.md) — adds the projectile asset validator to a field
- [Component Registry](../home/registries/component-registry.md)
- [Interaction Registry](../home/registries/interaction-registry.md)
